SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Peripherals

Class DuckTimer

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Peripherals.DuckTimer
public class DuckTimer extends Object
Emulates the DMG divider and programmable timer unit.

The timer follows the Game Boy's falling-edge behaviour and preserves the delayed TIMA overflow reload used by many test ROMs.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    CancelPendingOverflow()
    Cancels a pending delayed TIMA reload.
    DuckTimer.TimerState
    CaptureState()
    Captures the internal divider and overflow timing state.
    int
    GetInternalCounter()
    Returns the internal 16-bit divider counter.
    void
    InitialiseDmgBootState()
    Seeds the DMG post-boot divider phase used when the boot ROM is skipped.
    void
    ResetDiv()
    Resets the divider and applies the usual divider glitch behaviour.
    void
    RestoreState(DuckTimer.TimerState state)
    Restores the internal divider and overflow timing state.
    void
    SyncTimerBit()
    Recomputes the sampled timer bit after external state changes.
    void
    Tick()
    Advances the timer by one T-cycle.
    void
    WriteTac(int value)
    Writes TAC and applies the edge-triggered glitch when the selected timer bit falls from high to low.

    • timaOverflowPending

      public boolean timaOverflowPending

  • Constructor Details

    • DuckTimer

      public DuckTimer(DuckCPU cpu, DuckMemory memory)
      Creates a timer bound to the active CPU and memory bus.
      Parameters:
      cpu - CPU instance for interrupt requests
      memory - memory bus for register mirroring

  • Method Details

    • InitialiseDmgBootState

      public void InitialiseDmgBootState()
      Seeds the DMG post-boot divider phase used when the boot ROM is skipped.

    • Tick

      public void Tick()
      Advances the timer by one T-cycle.

    • ResetDiv

      public void ResetDiv()
      Resets the divider and applies the usual divider glitch behaviour.

    • SyncTimerBit

      public void SyncTimerBit()
      Recomputes the sampled timer bit after external state changes.

    • WriteTac

      public void WriteTac(int value)
      Writes TAC and applies the edge-triggered glitch when the selected timer bit falls from high to low.
      Parameters:
      value - new TAC value

    • GetInternalCounter

      public int GetInternalCounter()
      Returns the internal 16-bit divider counter.
      Returns:
      raw internal counter

    • CancelPendingOverflow

      public void CancelPendingOverflow()
      Cancels a pending delayed TIMA reload.

    • CaptureState

      public DuckTimer.TimerState CaptureState()
      Captures the internal divider and overflow timing state.
      Returns:
      timer state snapshot

    • RestoreState

      public void RestoreState(DuckTimer.TimerState state)
      Restores the internal divider and overflow timing state.
      Parameters:
      state - timer snapshot to restore
